channel.title: Panopto on Jared Szajkowski
channel.description: Recent content in Panopto on Jared Szajkowski

item.title: Using yt-dlp With Panopto
item.description:
Introduction

As a follow up to this post about using yt-dlp with Zoom, I found the need to also download videos hosted by Panopto for offline viewing.

Similar to the Zoom tutorial, this also requires you to have a “cookies” text file, which needs to contain the cookies export in the Netscape HTTP format of the Panopto hosting site after logging in.

Here’s the steps to setting this up:

Install cookie editor

Install the cookie editor extension. I personnally use it with Microsoft Edge, but there are similar extensions for Chrome, Firefox, etc.
